_comment: bridge-relay.integration.test.ts is excluded from tsc: it deliberately imports the runstatus SPA's BridgeTransport (an ESM, "type":"module" package) across the package boundary to guard the postMessage wire format end-to-end. Pulling that ESM graph into this CommonJS-resolution program causes module-format conflicts that are meaningless here. The test IS still run by `pnpm test` (tsx executes + node:test asserts it).
